Meet The Team
Leadership

image.alt: A smiling man with short hair and a beard wearing a navy blue Under Armour polo shirt stands in front of a white brick wall. He has a round red and white pin on his shirt.

elements.htmlCache: Blake Williams
Owner / Founder

settings.editor: Our trailblazer and visionary, with a cowboy’s spirit of adventure. (He’s got the hat and boots to match). He inspires our “Yes” mindset, and continually empowers our team to deliver excellent service to everyone we serve.

elements.htmlCache: Our trailblazer and visionary, with a cowboy’s spirit of adventure. (He’s got the hat and boots to match). He inspires our “Yes” mindset, and continually empowers our team to deliver excellent service to everyone we serve.

image.alt: A woman with long, wavy, reddish-brown hair smiles broadly while standing in front of a white brick wall. She is wearing a floral top with pink, red, and white colors and ruffled sleeves.

elements.htmlCache: Angela Williams
Owner / Founder

settings.editor: Our company’s voice of reason and Boss Lady extraordinaire! Her background in education and sales has given her a passion for customer care. She is dedicated to giving every client who calls the service they expect—and more!

elements.htmlCache: Our company’s voice of reason and Boss Lady extraordinaire! Her background in education and sales has given her a passion for customer care. She is dedicated to giving every client who calls the service they expect—and more!

image.alt: A middle-aged man with a shaved head and short beard is smiling. He is wearing a light blue collared shirt and standing in front of a white brick wall.

elements.htmlCache: Kevin Ray
CFO of Super Inspector

settings.editor: Kevin Ray is a humble leader with a background in organizational design, team accountability, and relationship-building across all levels. A Marine Corps veteran, he applies discipline and integrity to everything he does. Outside of work, he enjoys time with his wife and three kids, including one studying at the University of Arkansas.

elements.htmlCache: Kevin Ray is a humble leader with a background in organizational design, team accountability, and relationship-building across all levels. A Marine Corps veteran, he applies discipline and integrity to everything he does. Outside of work, he enjoys time with his wife and three kids, including one studying at the University of Arkansas.

image.alt: A man wearing a blue baseball cap and blue collared shirt with red S logos, smiling at the camera in front of a plain white background.

elements.htmlCache: Robert Dillin
CEO of Super Inspector

settings.editor: From growing up baling hay in the country to working on oil rigs around the US, Robert leads our whole inspecting team and takes care of any problems that arise. His passion is to increase the level of service and expertise our inspectors provide. When he’s not at work, you’ll find him out hunting or fishing and just enjoying the simple things in life.

image.alt: A woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a teal blazer over a white top and silver jewelry, smiles in front of a light-colored brick wall.

elements.htmlCache: Leah Ann Dillin
Vice President of Operations

settings.editor: Directing operations requires a sharp mind and quick processing, and Leah Ann’s tenacity keeps our ship afloat. She has a background in a variety of companies and her thoroughness and relentless work ethic is one of our team’s greatest powers!

About Super Inspector Las Vegas

settings.title: Trusted Home Inspection Experts in Las Vegas

elements.htmlCache: Trusted Home Inspection Experts in Las Vegas

settings.editor:
At Super Inspector Las Vegas, we go beyond a standard home inspection. Our team delivers detailed, high-quality evaluations designed to help buyers, sellers, and investors make confident decisions. From roofing and structure to electrical, plumbing, and HVAC systems, we focus on the areas that matter most—especially in the unique desert climate.

We know buying a home can be stressful, and our goal is to make the process simple, clear, and reliable from start to finish. With fast turnaround times and straightforward reporting, you’ll have the information you need without delays or confusion.

Our mission is to deliver exceptional service and a smooth experience for every client, agent, and partner we work with.

Our mission is to deliver exceptional service and a smooth experience for every client, agent, and partner we work with.

settings.title: Why Las Vegas Homebuyers Choose Us

elements.htmlCache: Why Las Vegas Homebuyers Choose Us

settings.editor:
Working with Super Inspector Las Vegas means more than just getting an inspection report. We provide clear communication, fast scheduling, and detailed digital reports so you can move forward with confidence. Our team understands the local market and delivers straightforward insights without unnecessary upsells or add-ons.

From your first call to your final report, we keep the process simple, efficient, and reliable—so you can focus on closing with peace of mind.

image.alt: A bold red letter S over a bright yellow circle with a black border; a small circled R for registered trademark appears in the top right corner.

elements.htmlCache: Built for Las Vegas Homebuyers

settings.editor:
Super Inspector Las Vegas is focused on delivering reliable, detail-driven home inspections tailored to the local market. Our team understands the unique challenges of desert homes—from heat impact on roofing and HVAC systems to long-term structural wear—so you get insights that actually matter.

We combine real-world experience with a straightforward, no-nonsense approach, giving you a clear understanding of your property without overcomplication. The result is a thorough inspection and a report you can trust when making one of the biggest decisions of your life.

settings.title: All In One Home Inspections Terms of Service

elements.htmlCache: All In One Home Inspections Terms of Service

settings.editor:
Terms of Use

 

Welcome

Welcome to the All In One Home Inspections website. This site is maintained to provide information and facilitate communication related to home inspection services.

By using this site, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use this site.

Use of This Site

Your use of this website constitutes acceptance of these Terms of Use, which may be updated at any time without notice. Continued use of the site indicates acceptance of any changes. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the site at any time without notice.

Trademarks

All In One Home Inspection, LLC and related logos, names, and branding are trademarks of All In One Home Inspection, LLC and are protected by applicable trademark laws.

Copyright

All content on this site, including text, graphics, images, logos, and layout, is the property of All In One Home Inspection, LLC and is protected by U.S. and international copyright laws. Content may be viewed, downloaded, or printed for personal, non-commercial use only. You may not reproduce, distribute, republish, or modify any content without prior written permission.

Third-Party Links

This site may contain links to third-party websites. These websites are not controlled by All In One Home Inspection, LLC, and we are not responsible for their content, policies, or availability.

Disclaimer

All In One Home Inspection, LLC makes reasonable efforts to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site but does not guarantee that all content is complete, accurate, or current.

User Submissions

Any feedback, suggestions, or other content submitted through this site may become the property of All In One Home Inspection, LLC and may be used without restriction, unless otherwise agreed in writing. If you require confidential treatment of any submission, you must request this in writing before submitting it.

No Warranties

This website is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. All In One Home Inspection, LLC makes no warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. Use of this site is at your own risk.

Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, All In One Home Inspection, LLC is not liable for any damages arising from the use of this site or services, including direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. Any liability related to services provided shall not exceed the amount paid for those services. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations, so these limitations may not apply in all cases.

Services Disclaimer

All In One Home Inspection, LLC does not guarantee the future performance, condition, or outcome of any property, system, or component inspected. All inspection services are provided based on professional judgment and the visible condition of the property at the time of inspection.

Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Maryland, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

Venue

Any legal action related to this site shall be brought in the appropriate courts located in Maryland.

Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.

Waiver

Failure to enforce any part of these Terms does not constitute a waiver of any rights under these Terms.

SMS Terms

We do not share mobile information with third parties for marketing or promotional purposes. All other categories exclude text messaging originator opt-in data and consent; this information will not be shared with third parties. We may share your information with service providers that assist in delivering SMS communications, such as messaging platforms and carriers. Message frequency may vary. Message and data rates may apply. Text HELP for assistance. Text STOP to unsubscribe.

Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms, you may contact us at:

Email: office@allinonehomeinspections.com
Phone: (301) 373-6430

settings.title: All In One Home Inspections Privacy Policy

elements.htmlCache: All In One Home Inspections Privacy Policy

settings.editor:
Privacy Policy

 

Who We Are

All In One Home Inspections is a home inspection company serving the DC, Maryland, and Virginia area.
Our website address is: https://allinonehomeinspections.com/

Information You Provide

When you submit a form on our website, we collect the information you provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, and property details. This information is used to respond to your inquiry and provide our services.

Comments

When visitors leave comments on the site, we collect the data shown in the comments form, along with the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help with spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address, also called a hash, may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS). Visitors can download and extract location data from images on the site.

Mobile Information / SMS

We do not share mobile information with third parties for marketing or promotional purposes. All other categories exclude text messaging originator opt-in data and consent; this information will not be shared with any third parties. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. Carriers are not liable for delayed or undelivered messages. Text HELP for help. Text STOP to unsubscribe.

Cookies

If you leave a comment, you may opt in to saving your name, email address, and website in cookies. These are for your convenience and last for one year.

If you visit our login page, a temporary cookie will be set to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we set cookies to save your login information and screen preferences. Login cookies last two days, and screen option cookies last one year. If you select “Remember Me,” your login persists for two weeks. Logging out removes login cookies.

If you edit or publish content, an additional cookie is saved in your browser. This includes no personal data and expires after one day.

Embedded Content from Other Websites

Articles on this site may include embedded content such as videos, images, and other media. Embedded content from other websites behaves in the same way as if you visited the external website directly.

These websites may collect data, use cookies, embed third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that content.

Analytics

We may use third-party services such as Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our website. These services may collect information such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

Who We Share Your Data With

We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers, such as hosting, analytics, or communication tools, only as necessary to operate our website and provide our services.

If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How Long We Retain Your Data

If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely.

For users that register on our site, if any, we store the personal information provided in their profile. Users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time, except usernames. Website administrators can also access and edit that information.

What Rights You Have Over Your Data

If you have an account on this site or have left comments, you can request an exported file of the personal data we hold about you. You can also request that we erase your personal data, except for any data we are required to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where Your Data Is Sent

Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

Maryland Privacy Rights

Maryland residents may contact us with questions about how their personal information is collected, used, and stored. We do not sell personal information.

Contact Information

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you may contact us at:

Email: office@allinonehomeinspections.com
Phone: (301) 373-6430

Super Inspector Cookie Policy

settings.editor: This page provides comprehensive information about how we use cookies on our website to enhance your browsing experience, improve website performance, and deliver personalized content. Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our site. They help us understand how visitors interact with our website, allowing us to offer a smoother and more efficient user experience. In the table below, you will find detailed information about each type of cookie we use, their purpose, and how long they remain on your device. We are committed to respecting your privacy and providing transparency about the data we collect through cookies. For more information on how we handle your personal data, please see our Privacy Policy.

_gac_ Contains information related to marketing campaigns of the user. These are shared with Google AdWords / Google Ads when the Google Ads and Google Analytics accounts are linked together. 90 days
__utma ID used to identify users and sessions 2 years after last activity
__utmt Used to monitor number of Google Analytics server requests 10 minutes
__utmb Used to distinguish new sessions and visits. The cookie is set when the GA.js javascript library is loaded and there is no existing __utmb cookie. The cookie is updated every time data is sent to the Google Analytics server. 30 minutes after last activity
__utmc Used only with old Urchin versions of Google Analytics and not with GA.js. Was used to distinguish between new sessions and visits at the end of a session. End of session (browser)
__utmz Contains information about the traffic source or campaign that directed the user to the website. The cookie is set when the GA.js javascript is loaded and updated when data is sent to the Google Analytics server. 6 months after last activity
__utmv Contains custom information set by the web developer via the _setCustomVar method in Google Analytics. This cookie is updated every time new data is sent to the Google Analytics server. 2 years after last activity

ekit_testimonial_data.review: "Excellent service, very fast and reliable. They are very detailed and will provide you with the information in a detailed and educated manner. I also learned a lot about what to look for in a house when getting it inspected."
"Jeff is a very knowledgeable and thorough inspector. My utmost recommendation for such an outstanding job!!!"

"All In One was excellent from start to finish. They were very accommodating while I was awaiting an acceptance on a competitive offer letter. I ordered a home inspection plus termite inspection at a very competitive price. The management office gets an A+ from me."

"I had a home inspection including pest inspection done by Steve. He was great and explained everything as he was moving from one part of house to the next. Provided a full written report in less than 24 hours. Highly recommend this company."

"Very quick to schedule and very thorough with our inspection. All our questions were answered promptly. We especially loved the certificate for No Monsters Found to show our lil guy for the move. Highly recommend All In One."
"Michael was amazing. He was thorough and knowledgeable about the the inspection process. He was patient and advised my husband what was going on. I would recommend All In One Home Inspection."

"Incredibly thorough with home inspections from top to bottom! Was able to walk through, have questions answered and make our first time home buying experience a breeze! Super friendly staff all around from inspectors to appointment specialists."
"We had our inspection yesterday for my clients and Michael was our inspector. He was very thorough and took his time. He even stayed up late to get the report out to me and my clients last night."

"Very thorough inspection performed by Alex. He was great to work with. Report was easy to understand and well organized. Although I am a realtor, clients select the company of choice so I had not yet experienced this company. Very satisfied."

elements.htmlCache: Frequently Asked Questions

settings.editor: Buying, selling, or building a home comes with a lot of questions. Here are clear answers to some of the most common questions about our home inspection services, what’s included, turnaround times, and what to expect from the process.

elements.htmlCache: Buying, selling, or building a home comes with a lot of questions. Here are clear answers to some of the most common questions about our home inspection services, what’s included, turnaround times, and what to expect from the process.

background_image.alt: A man wearing gloves and a cap kneels on grass, using a diagnostic device to inspect underground pipes through an open access panel in a yard. Gardening tools and plants are visible nearby.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: What does a home inspection include?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: With a host of additional ancillary services like pool and spa inspection, septic and well water inspection and radon testing, we cover all grounds to make sure you are confident and comfortable with your real estate investment.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: How long does an inspection take?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: The duration of a home inspection depends on several factors, including the size of the home, accessibility to different areas of the property, and whether utilities are on. While we always work efficiently, we never rush the inspection process at the expense of quality.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: When will I get my report?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: You can expect your home inspection report within 24 hours of the inspection in most cases. We provide clear, detailed reports and are always happy to review the findings with you if you have any questions.
Yes. Our home inspectors are certified and stay current with industry standards through ongoing training and continuing education.

Absolutely. We encourage clients to attend the inspection, especially toward the end. Being there gives you the chance to see important findings firsthand, ask questions, and better understand the home’s systems, maintenance points, and overall condition.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: Do you inspect new construction homes?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: Yes. Even new construction homes can have defects or incomplete work. Our inspectors evaluate key components and systems to help identify issues before closing, so you can address them with the builder as early as possible.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: How much does a home inspection cost?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: The cost of a home inspection depends on factors such as the size, age, and features of the property, as well as any additional services you choose. We offer transparent pricing and customized options, including add-ons like radon, mold, septic, and well-water testing. Contact us for a personalized quote based on your property and inspection needs.

elements.htmlCache:
What does a home inspection include?

With a host of additional ancillary services like pool and spa inspection, septic and well water inspection and radon testing, we cover all grounds to make sure you are confident and comfortable with your real estate investment.

How long does an inspection take?

The duration of a home inspection depends on several factors, including the size of the home, accessibility to different areas of the property, and whether utilities are on. While we always work efficiently, we never rush the inspection process at the expense of quality.

When will I get my report?

You can expect your home inspection report within 24 hours of the inspection in most cases. We provide clear, detailed reports and are always happy to review the findings with you if you have any questions.

Are your inspectors certified?

Yes. Our home inspectors are certified and stay current with industry standards through ongoing training and continuing education.

Can I attend the inspection?

Absolutely. We encourage clients to attend the inspection, especially toward the end. Being there gives you the chance to see important findings firsthand, ask questions, and better understand the home’s systems, maintenance points, and overall condition.

Do you inspect new construction homes?

Yes. Even new construction homes can have defects or incomplete work. Our inspectors evaluate key components and systems to help identify issues before closing, so you can address them with the builder as early as possible.

How much does a home inspection cost?

The cost of a home inspection depends on factors such as the size, age, and features of the property, as well as any additional services you choose. We offer transparent pricing and customized options, including add-ons like radon, mold, septic, and well-water testing. Contact us for a personalized quote based on your property and inspection needs.

Our Story

settings.editor:
All-in-One started with a simple belief: that every homeowner deserves clarity, honesty, and confidence when making one of life's biggest investments. What began as a local, family-run operation quickly grew through word-of-mouth, trusted referrals, and a reputation for going above and beyond.

Over the years, we've inspected hundreds of homes—each one treated with the same care we'd give our own. From new builds to century-old properties, our mission has stayed the same: deliver detailed, dependable inspections with integrity, professionalism, and a personal touch.

We know buying a home can be stressful, and our goal is to make the process simple, clear, and reliable from start to finish. With fast turnaround times and straightforward reporting, you’ll have the information you need without delays or confusion.

Our mission is to deliver exceptional service and a smooth experience for every client, agent, and partner we work with.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: We believe in open, honest communication. From what we find to how we report it, you'll always know exactly what's happening, why it matters, and what comes next.

We're Maryland-born and DMV-grown. At All-In-One, we're more than inspectors; we're your neighbors. We nurture connections, listen to your needs, and contribute to the well-being of the areas we serve. We're committed to building lasting relationships, one home, one client at a time. Simply put, your home is our home!

Our YES mindset means we combine technology and experience for a precise home inspection. It means you get all round support and your concerns are our concerns. It means we find a way to earn and keep your trust.

AIO's Home Services Team
Utilities & Move-In Set Up

settings.editor: Helping homebuyers across DC, Maryland & Virginia get connected after closing.

Your Home Services Team

settings.title: Real People Who Make Your Move Easier

elements.htmlCache: Real People Who Make Your Move Easier

settings.editor:
After your inspection, the not-so-fun part of moving begins — getting your utilities and essential services switched on. Our Home Services team is here to take the busywork off your plate.

Across the DMV, utilities are handled by your local providers, so our help focuses on getting your internet, TV, and home security connected — and pointing you to the right contacts for power, water, and gas.

You'll always work directly with our Home Services team — real people who are part of the company, every step of the way.

Utility Info & Vendors

We'll point you to your local power, water, and gas providers and recommend trusted vendors.

settings.title: Service setup we can complete over the phone is limited to our partner providers; we'll always tell you what's available at your address.

elements.htmlCache: Service setup we can complete over the phone is limited to our partner providers; we'll always tell you what's available at your address.
Your Information is Safe
Secure Handling, Then Deleted

settings.editor:
Setting up some accounts means sharing personal details. We handle that information through a secure, encrypted system used only to create your accounts — it is not kept on file afterward.

No pressure, no upsells, and no surprises. Just a trusted hand to get your new home connected.
